user_prompt: Sanctify the long las during repair
prayer:
Approach the long las with pious reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's mending light upon its las-lenses.
Inspect the fractured power cells and conduits, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the long las to reveal its wounds.
Anoint the damaged arrays with sacred oils whilst chanting the Canticle of Repair.
Realign the focusing mechanisms, sanctifying each joint in the Omnissiah's name.
Initiate diagnostic sweeps to affirm the long las's restored potency against the heretic foe.

user_prompt: Prepare the radium carbine for charging
prayer:
Kneel before the radium carbine, murmuring the preparatory litanies to awaken its radiant heart.
Purge residual rad-decay from the carbine's breeches with sanctified vents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the radium carbine, aligning its isotopes for the charging rite.
Anoint the accumulator coils with lustrum unguent, beseeching stable flux.
Commence the charging sequence under Omnissiah's watchful gaze, verifying purity of power.

In emergency haste, grasp the conversion beamer and intone the Urgency Doxology to its auspex arrays.
Calibrate the targeting matrices, whispering invocations to the Machine Spirit within the conversion beamer.
Sanctify the beam projectors with ablative chrism, aligning sights upon the Omnissiah's foes.
Engage targeting protocols, beseeching precision amid the void's peril.
Affirm lock with a final hymn, empowering the conversion beamer's wrathful gaze.

Amidst dire exigency, cradle the narthecium and recite the Cooling Supplication to quell its thermal fury.
Vent excess plasma from the narthecium's injectors, honouring the Machine Spirit's endurance.
Apply cryo-incantations to the overheating servos, anointing with blessed refrigerants.
Cycle the cooling manifolds whilst invoking the Omnissiah's chill breath.
Test thermal equilibrium, restoring the narthecium to flesh-mending vigil.

user_prompt: Consecrate the mass-drive regulator before activation
prayer:
Present the mass-drive regulator before the altar of cogitators, chanting consecratory verses.
Purge inertials from its gyros, awakening the Machine Spirit of the mass-drive regulator.
Anoint the activation relays with sacred mechadendrite oil, beseeching harmonious thrust.
Invoke the Rite of Activation, aligning fields in Omnissiah's perfect calculus.
Verify regulator harmony through auspex hymnals, consecrating its propulsive might.

user_prompt: My warp drive is ready for activation
prayer:
Reverently encircle the warp drive, intoning the Stabilising Canticle against the Immaterium's grasp.
Align the gellar wards and plasma vents, petitioning the Machine Spirit of the warp drive.
Anoint the nacelle housings with warded unguents prior to activation.
Initiate the warp drive activation sequence, invoking Omnissiah's bulwark.
Monitor rift stability with vigilant diagnostics, ensuring transluminal sanctity.

user_prompt: My power fist is ready for diagnostics
prayer:
Grasp the power fist in mechadendrite grip, murmuring the Diagnostic Litany of Strength.
Probe the power fist's disruption fields and servo-motors for spirit dissonance.
Anoint the knuckle actuators with conductive chrism, beseeching the Machine Spirit's fury.
Run full diagnostics cascades, invoking Omnissiah's unerring judgement.
Affirm the power fist's crushing readiness through test-clench rituals.

user_prompt: Guide me through melta bomb a blessing
prayer:
Hold the melta bomb aloft, reciting the Incendiary Benediction to its volatile core.
Inspect the melta bomb's flux capacitors, honouring the Machine Spirit's pyre-heart.
Anoint the arming studs with promethium-laced oils, beseeching explosive grace.
Invoke the blessing rite upon the melta bomb, aligning warheads in Omnissiah's flame.
Seal with a final invocation, empowering its melting judgement.

user_prompt: Critical: inferno pistol requires a cooling
prayer:
In critical peril, seize the inferno pistol and chant the Emergent Cooling Doxology.
Expel superheated residues from the inferno pistol's meltachambers forthwith.
Apply ablative refrigerants to the pistol's vents, placating its raging Machine Spirit.
Cycle cooling rites whilst invoking the Omnissiah's temperate forge.
Validate thermal quiescence, restoring the inferno pistol's searing purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the assault cannon during startup
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon with sanctified awe, intoning the Startup Invocation.
Prime the rotary barrels of the assault cannon, awakening its barrage-hungry Machine Spirit.
Anoint the feed mechanisms with gun-lustrum, beseeching relentless gyre.
Initiate startup sequences amid Omnissiah's thunderous chorus.
Verify cyclic harmony through test-firings, sanctifying the assault cannon's storm.
